vidhāya rakṣān paritaḥ paretarān aśaṅkitākāram upaiti śaṅkitaḥ paritaḥ+paretarān · vihitāṃ priyayā manaḥpriyām atha niścitya giraṃ garīyasīm manas+priyām→manaḥpriyām · vidhuraṃ kim ataḥ paraṃ parair avagītāṃ gamite daśām imām ataḥ+paraṃ · abhimānavato manasvinaḥ priyam uccaiḥ padam ārurukṣataḥ uccaiḥ+padam

guṇānurāgeṇa śirobhir uhyate narādhipair mālyam ivāsya śāsanam narādhipair+mālyam · madasiktamukhair mṛgādhipaḥ karibhir vartayati svayaṃ hataiḥ mukhaiḥ→madasiktamukhair +mṛgādhipaḥ · spṛhaṇīyaguṇair mahātmabhiś carite vartmani yacchatāṃ manaḥ guṇaiḥ→spṛhaṇīyaguṇair +mahātmabhiś · samācarācāram upāttaśastro japopavāsābhiṣavair munīnām abhiṣavaiḥ→japopavāsābhiṣavair +munīnām

dviṣannimittā yad iyaṃ daśā tataḥ samūlam unmūlayatīva me manaḥ tataḥ+sa · yad avocata vīkṣya māninī paritaḥ snehamayena cakṣuṣā paritaḥ+sneha · abhibhūtibhayād asūn ataḥ sukham ujhanti na dhāma māninaḥ ataḥ+sukham · triḥsaptakṛtvo jagatīpatīnāṃ hantā gurur yasya sa jāmadagnyaḥ tris+sapta→triḥsaptakṛtvo

tavānubhāvo 'yam abodhi yan mayā nigūḍhatattvaṃ nayavartma vidviṣām anubhāvaḥ→tavānubhāvo +'yam · viśaṅkamāno bhavataḥ parābhavaṃ nṛpāsanastho 'pi vanādhivāsinaḥ sthaḥ→nṛpāsanastho +'pi · sakhīn iva prītiyujo 'nujīvinaḥ samānamānān suhṛdaś ca bandhubhiḥ yujaḥ→prītiyujo +'nujīvinaḥ · akhilaṃ hi hinasti bhūdharaṃ taruśākhāntanigharṣajo 'nalaḥ jaḥ→taruśākhāntanigharṣajo +'nalaḥ

sadānukūleṣu hi kurvate ratiṃ nṛpeṣv amātyeṣu ca sarvasampadaḥ nṛpeṣv+amātyeṣu · kriyāpavargeṣv anujīvisātkṛtāḥ kṛtajñatām asya vadanti sampadaḥ apavargeṣu→kriyāpavargeṣv +anujīvisātkṛtāḥ · makheṣv akhinno 'numataḥ purodhasā dhinoti havyena hiraṇyaretasam makheṣv+akhinno · catasṛṣv api te vivekinī nṛpa vidyāsu nirūḍhim āgatā catasṛṣv+api

na tena sajyaṃ kvacid udyataṃ dhanur na vā kṛtaṃ kopavijihmam ānanam udyataṃ+dhanur · akhaṇḍam ākhaṇḍalatulyadhāmabhiś ciraṃ dhṛtā bhūpatibhiḥ svavaṃśajaiḥ ciraṃ+dhṛtā · sa valkavāsāṃsi tavādhunāharan karoti manyuṃ na kathaṃ dhanaṃjayaḥ kathaṃ+dhanaṃjayaḥ · apaneyam udetum icchatā timiraṃ roṣamayaṃ dhiyā puraḥ mayam→roṣamayaṃ +dhiyā

vijitya yaḥ prājyam ayacchad uttarān kurūn akupyaṃ vasu vāsavopamaḥ ayacchad+uttarān · sa tu tatra viśeṣadurlabhaḥ sad upanyasyati kṛtyavartma yaḥ sad+upanyasyati · athoccakair āsanataḥ parārdhyād udyan sa dhūtāruṇavalkalāgraḥ parārdhyād+udyan · utphullasthalanalinīvanād amuṣmād uddhūtaḥ sarasijasambhavaḥ parāgaḥ amuṣmād+uddhūtaḥ

vasūni vāñchan na vaśī na manyunā svadharma ity eva nivṛttakāraṇaḥ vāñchan+na · dviṣannimittā yad iyaṃ daśā tataḥ samūlam unmūlayatīva me manaḥ dviṣat+nimittā→dviṣannimittā · janavan na bhavantam akṣamā nayasiddher apanetum arhati vat→janavan +na · śiloccayaṃ cāruśiloccayaṃ tam eṣa kṣaṇān neṣyati guhyakas tvām kṣaṇān+neṣyati

guṇānurāgād iva sakhyam īyivān na bādhate 'sya trigaṇaḥ parasparam anurāgāt→guṇānurāgād +iva · tavābhidhānād vyathate natānanaḥ sa duḥsahān mantrapadād ivoragaḥ padāt→mantrapadād +iva · dviṣannimittā yad iyaṃ daśā tataḥ samūlam unmūlayatīva me manaḥ yad+iyaṃ · apayānty acirān mahībhujāṃ jananirvādabhayād iva śriyaḥ bhayāt→jananirvādabhayād +iva

avahitahṛdayo vidhāya sa arhām ṛṣivad ṛṣipravare gurūpadiṣṭām hṛdayaḥ→avahitahṛdayo +vidhāya · tulyā bhavaddarśanasampad eṣā vṛṣṭer divo vītabalāhakāyāḥ divo+vīta · papāta pūrvāṃ jahato vijihmatāṃ vṛṣopabhuktāntikasasyasampadaḥ jahato+vijihma · upatasthur āsthitaviṣādadhiyaḥ śatayajvano vanacarā vasatim śatayajvano+vana

samunnayan bhūtim anāryasaṃgamād varaṃ virodho 'pi samaṃ mahātmabhiḥ saṃgamāt→anāryasaṃgamād +varaṃ · sa cintayaty eva bhiyas tvad eṣyatīr aho durantā balavadvirodhitā balavat+virodhi→balavadvirodhitā · tavābhidhānād vyathate natānanaḥ sa duḥsahān mantrapadād ivoragaḥ abhidhānāt→tavābhidhānād +vyathate · api vāgadhipasya durvacaṃ vacanaṃ tad vidadhīta vismayam tad+vidadhīta

na vivyathe tasya mano na hi priyaṃ pravaktum icchanti mṛṣā hitaiṣiṇaḥ mano+na · kriyāsu yuktair nṛpa cāracakṣuṣo na vañcanīyāḥ prabhavo 'nujīvibhiḥ cakṣuṣaḥ→cāracakṣuṣo +na · vrajanti śatrūn avadhūya niḥspṛhāḥ śamena siddhiṃ munayo na bhūbhṛtaḥ munayo+na · prabhavaḥ khalu kośadaṇḍayoḥ kṛtapañcāṅgavinirṇayo nayaḥ vinirṇayaḥ→kṛtapañcāṅgavinirṇayo +nayaḥ

dviṣannimittā yad iyaṃ daśā tataḥ samūlam unmūlayatīva me manaḥ unmūlayati+iva→unmūlayatīva · vihāya lakṣmīpatilakṣma kārmukaṃ jaṭādharaḥ sañ juhudhīha pāvakam juhudhi+iha→juhudhīha · uvāca yakṣas tam acodito 'pi gāṃ na hīṅgitajño 'vasare 'vasīdati hi+iṅgita→hīṅgitajño · asaktam ūdhāṃsi payaḥ kṣaranty amūr upāyanānīva nayanti dhenavaḥ upāyanāni+iva→upāyanānīva

laghuvṛttitayā bhidāṃ gataṃ bahir antaś ca nṛpasya maṇḍalam gataṃ+bahir · baddhāṃ baddhāṃ bhittiśaṅkām amuṣmin nāvānāvān mātariśvā nihanti baddhāṃ+baddhāṃ · kṣipati yo 'nuvanaṃ vitatāṃ bṛhadbṛhatikām iva raucanikīṃ rucam vitatāṃ+bṛhat · sa dadarśa vetasavanācaritāṃ praṇatiṃ balīyasi samṛddhikarīm praṇatiṃ+balīyasi

kriyāsu yuktair nṛpa cāracakṣuṣo na vañcanīyāḥ prabhavo 'nujīvibhiḥ yuktair+nṛpa · na tena sajyaṃ kvacid udyataṃ dhanur na vā kṛtaṃ kopavijihmam ānanam dhanur+na · tejasvitāyā vijayaikavṛtter nighnan priyaṃ prāṇam ivābhimānam vṛtteḥ→vijayaikavṛtter +nighnan · mukhaiś calatkuṇḍalaraśmirañjitair navātapāmṛṣṭasarojacārubhiḥ rañjitaiḥ→calatkuṇḍalaraśmirañjitair +nava

sa saṃtataṃ darśayate gatasmayaḥ kṛtādhipatyām iva sādhu bandhutām kṛtā+ādhipatyām→kṛtādhipatyām · kṛtānatir vyāhṛtasāntvavāde jātaspṛhaḥ puṇyajanaḥ sa jiṣṇau kṛtā+ānatiḥ→kṛtānatir · athābhipaśyann iva vidviṣaḥ puraḥ purodhasāropitahetisaṃhatiḥ purodhasā+āropita→purodhasāropitahetisaṃhatiḥ · dyutiṃ samagrāṃ samitir gavām asāv upaiti mantrair iva saṃhitāhutiḥ saṃhitā+āhutiḥ→saṃhitāhutiḥ

tavānubhāvo 'yam abodhi yan mayā nigūḍhatattvaṃ nayavartma vidviṣām anubhāvaḥ+'yam · viśaṅkamāno bhavataḥ parābhavaṃ nṛpāsanastho 'pi vanādhivāsinaḥ sthaḥ+'pi · sakhīn iva prītiyujo 'nujīvinaḥ samānamānān suhṛdaś ca bandhubhiḥ yujaḥ+'nujīvinaḥ · akhilaṃ hi hinasti bhūdharaṃ taruśākhāntanigharṣajo 'nalaḥ jaḥ+'nalaḥ

phalanty upāyāḥ paribṛṃhitāyatīr upetya saṃgharṣam ivārthasampadaḥ phalanty+upāyāḥ · kathaṃ na manyur jvalayaty udīritaḥ śamītaruṃ śuṣkam ivāgnir ucchikhaḥ jvalayaty+udīritaḥ · avibhidya niśākṛtaṃ tamaḥ prabhayā nāṃśumatāpy udīyate api→nāṃśumatāpy +udīyate · aṇur apy upahanti vigrahaḥ prabhum antaḥprakṛtiprakopajaḥ apy+upahanti

sa vidheyapadeṣu dakṣatāṃ niyatiṃ loka ivānurudhyate niyatiṃ+loka · sa sadā phalaśālinīṃ kriyāṃ śaradaṃ loka ivādhitiṣṭhati śaradaṃ+loka · tanvantam iddham abhito gurum aṃśujālaṃ lakṣmīm uvāha sakalasya śaśāṅkamūrteḥ jālam→aṃśujālaṃ +lakṣmīm · saṃdarśanaṃ lokaguror amogham amoghaṃ tavātmayoner iva kiṃ na dhatte saṃdarśanaṃ+lokaguror

tulyād vibhāgād iva tanmanobhir duḥkhātibhāro 'pi laghuḥ sa mene sa+mene · hṛtapriyādṛṣṭivilāsavibhramā mano 'sya jahruḥ śapharīvivṛttayaḥ vibhramāḥ→hṛtapriyādṛṣṭivilāsavibhramā +mano · sa mantharāvalgitapīvarastanīḥ pariśramaklāntavilocanotpalāḥ sa+manthara · vividhakāmahitā mahitāmbhasaḥ sphuṭasarojavanā javanā nadīḥ hitāḥ→vividhakāmahitā +mahita

kṣayapakṣa ivaindavīḥ kalāḥ sakalā hanti sa śaktisampadaḥ sakalā+hanti · śaradabhracalāś calendriyair asurakṣā hi bahucchalāḥ śriyaḥ rakṣāḥ→asurakṣā +hi · sujayaḥ khalu tādṛg antare vipadantā hy avinītasampadaḥ antāḥ→vipadantā +hy · amī samuddhūtasarojareṇunā hṛtā hṛtāsārakaṇena vāyunā hṛtā+hṛta

mahodayais tasya hitānubandhibhiḥ pratīyate dhātur ivehitaṃ phalaiḥ iva+īhitam→ivehitaṃ · mādhuryavisrambhaviśeṣabhājā kṛtopasambhāṣam ivekṣitena iva+īkṣitena→ivekṣitena · śivam agātmajayā ca kṛterṣyayā sakalahaṃ sagaṇaṃ śucimānasam kṛta+īrṣyayā→kṛterṣyayā · pavaneritākulavijihmaśikhā jagatīruho 'vacakaruḥ kusumaiḥ pavana+īrita→pavaneritākulavijihmaśikhā

sa vidheyapadeṣu dakṣatāṃ niyatiṃ loka ivānurudhyate loka+iva · vimalā tava vistare girāṃ matir ādarśa ivābhidṛśyate ādarśa+iva · sa sadā phalaśālinīṃ kriyāṃ śaradaṃ loka ivādhitiṣṭhati loka+iva · kṣayapakṣa ivaindavīḥ kalāḥ sakalā hanti sa śaktisampadaḥ pakṣe→kṣayapakṣa +iva

sukhena labhyā dadhataḥ kṛṣīvalair akṛṣṭapacyā iva sasyasampadaḥ labhyā+dadhataḥ · tavābhidhānād vyathate natānanaḥ sa duḥsahān mantrapadād ivoragaḥ sa+duḥsahān · tathāpi vaktuṃ vyavasāyayanti māṃ nirastanārīsamayā durādhayaḥ samayāḥ→nirastanārīsamayā +durādhayaḥ · prakurvate vāridarodhanirgatāḥ parasparālāpam ivāmalā diśaḥ amalāḥ→ivāmalā +diśaḥ

kathaṃ na manyur jvalayaty udīritaḥ śamītaruṃ śuṣkam ivāgnir ucchikhaḥ manyur+jvalayaty · śarannadīnāṃ pulinaiḥ kutūhalaṃ galaddukūlair jaghanair ivādadhe dukūlaiḥ→galaddukūlair +jaghanair · jagatprasūtir jagadekapāvanī vrajopakaṇṭhaṃ tanayair upeyuṣī prasūtiḥ→jagatprasūtir +jagat · rucirapallavapuṣpalatāgṛhair upalasajjalajair jalarāśibhiḥ jalajaiḥ→upalasajjalajair +jala

vidhisamayaniyogād dīptisaṃhārajihmaṃ śithilabalam agādhe magnam āpatpayodhau āpad+payodhau→āpatpayodhau · kṣayayuktim upekṣate kṛtī kurute tatpratikāram anyathā tad+pratikāram→tatpratikāram · jayaśriyaṃ pārtha pṛthūkarotu te śarat prasannāmbur anambuvāridā śarat+prasanna · tatpūrvaṃ pratividadhe surāpagāyā vaprāntaskhalitavivartanaṃ payobhiḥ tad+pūrvam→tatpūrvaṃ

sa tu tatra viśeṣadurlabhaḥ sad upanyasyati kṛtyavartma yaḥ sa+tu · vīryaṃ ca vidvatsu sute maghonaḥ sa teṣu na sthānam avāpa śokaḥ sa+teṣu · dhṛtasatpathas tripathagām abhitaḥ sa tam āruroha puruhūtasutaḥ sa+tam · sariduttarīyam iva saṃhatimat sa taraṅgaraṅgi kalahaṃsakulam sa+taraṃga

pariṇāmasukhe garīyasi vyathake 'smin vacasi kṣataujasām kṣata+ojasām→kṣataujasām · tathāpi nighnaṃ nṛpa tāvakīnaiḥ prahvīkṛtaṃ me hṛdayaṃ guṇaughaiḥ guṇa+oghaiḥ→guṇaughaiḥ · ekaughabhūtaṃ tad aśarma kṛṣṇāṃ vibhāvarīṃ dhvāntam iva prapede eka+ogha→ekaughabhūtaṃ · vītaujasaḥ sannidhimātraśeṣā bhavatkṛtāṃ bhūtim apekṣamāṇāḥ vīta+ojasaḥ→vītaujasaḥ

sa sauṣṭhavaudāryaviśeṣaśālinīṃ viniścitārthām iti vācam ādadhe sa+sauṣṭhava · sa saṃtataṃ darśayate gatasmayaḥ kṛtādhipatyām iva sādhu bandhutām sa+saṃtataṃ · adabhradarbhām adhiśayya sa sthalīṃ jahāsi nidrām aśivaiḥ śivārutaiḥ sa+sthalīṃ · sa sadā phalaśālinīṃ kriyāṃ śaradaṃ loka ivādhitiṣṭhati sa+sadā

tathāpi jihmaḥ sa bhavajjigīṣayā tanoti śubhraṃ guṇasampadā yaśaḥ sa+bhavat · dhunvan dhanuḥ kasya raṇe na kuryān mano bhayaikapravaṇaṃ sa bhīṣmaḥ sa+bhīṣmaḥ · vītaujasaḥ sannidhimātraśeṣā bhavatkṛtāṃ bhūtim apekṣamāṇāḥ śeṣāḥ→sannidhimātraśeṣā +bhavat · samānaduḥkhā iva nas tvadīyāḥ sarūpatāṃ pārtha guṇā bhajante guṇā+bhajante

jananātha tavānujanmanāṃ kṛtam āviṣkṛtapauruṣair bhujaiḥ pauruṣaiḥ→āviṣkṛtapauruṣair +bhujaiḥ · vidhāya vidhvaṃsanam ātmanīnaṃ śamaikavṛtter bhavataś chalena vṛtteḥ→śamaikavṛtter +bhavataś · agrasānuṣu nitāntapiśaṅgair bhūruhān mṛdukarair avalambya piśaṅgaiḥ→nitāntapiśaṅgair +bhūruhān · saṃnikṛṣṭaratibhiḥ suradārair bhūṣitair api vibhūṣaṇam īṣe dāraiḥ→suradārair +bhūṣitair

navair guṇaiḥ samprati saṃstavasthiraṃ tirohitaṃ prema ghanāgamaśriyaḥ navair+guṇaiḥ · vipāṇḍubhir glānatayā payodharaiś cyutācirābhāguṇahemadāmabhiḥ vipāṇḍubhir+glāna · dyutiṃ samagrāṃ samitir gavām asāv upaiti mantrair iva saṃhitāhutiḥ samitir+gavām · śamayan dhṛtendriyaśamaikasukhaḥ śucibhir guṇair aghamayaṃ sa tamaḥ śucibhir+guṇair

abhiyoga imān mahībhujo bhavatā tasya tataḥ kṛtāvadheḥ tataḥ+kṛta · sahate na jano 'py adhaḥkriyāṃ kimu lokādhikadhāma rājakam adhas+kriyām→adhaḥkriyāṃ · yaśaḥkṣayakṣīṇajalārṇavābhas tvam anyam ākāram ivābhipannaḥ yaśas+kṣaya→yaśaḥkṣayakṣīṇajalārṇavābhas · parītam ukṣāvajaye jayaśriyā nadantam uccaiḥ kṣatasindhurodhasam uccaiḥ+kṣata

mahaujaso mānadhanā dhanārcitā dhanurbhṛtaḥ saṃyati labdhakīrtayaḥ ojasaḥ→mahaujaso +māna · abhimānavato manasvinaḥ priyam uccaiḥ padam ārurukṣataḥ abhimānavato+manasvinaḥ · citāni gharmāmbukaṇaiḥ samantato mukhāny anutphullavilocanāni ca samantato+mukhāny · atiprasaṅgād vihitāgaso muhuḥ prakampam īyuḥ sabhayā ivormayaḥ āgasaḥ→vihitāgaso +muhuḥ

nanu vaktṛviśeṣaniḥspṛhā guṇagṛhyā vacane vipaścitaḥ niḥspṛhāḥ→vaktṛviśeṣaniḥspṛhā +guṇa · udāracetā giram ityudārāṃ dvaipāyanenābhidadhe narendraḥ cetāḥ→udāracetā +giram · ākṣiptadrumagahanā yugāntavātaiḥ paryastā giraya iva dvipā virejuḥ paryastā+giraya · surāṅganā gopaticāpagopuraṃ puraṃ vanānāṃ vijihīrṣayā jahuḥ aṅganāḥ→surāṅganā +gopati

upasāntvayituṃ mahīpatir dviradaṃ duṣṭam ivopacakrame mahīpatir+dviradaṃ · anāptapuṇyopacarair durāpā phalasya nirdhūtarajāḥ savitrī upacaraiḥ→anāptapuṇyopacarair +durāpā · tulyād vibhāgād iva tanmanobhir duḥkhātibhāro 'pi laghuḥ sa mene manobhiḥ→tanmanobhir +duḥkha · ayam anekahiraṇmayakaṃdaras tava pitur dayito jagatīdharaḥ pitur+dayito

vigaṇayya nayanti pauruṣaṃ vijitakrodharayā jigīṣavaḥ rayāḥ→vijitakrodharayā +jigīṣavaḥ · triḥsaptakṛtvo jagatīpatīnāṃ hantā gurur yasya sa jāmadagnyaḥ sa+jāmadagnyaḥ · kṛtānatir vyāhṛtasāntvavāde jātaspṛhaḥ puṇyajanaḥ sa jiṣṇau sa+jiṣṇau · vividhakāmahitā mahitāmbhasaḥ sphuṭasarojavanā javanā nadīḥ vanāḥ→sphuṭasarojavanā +javanā

tad āśu kartuṃ tvayi jihmam udyate vidhīyatāṃ tatra vidheyam uttaram tad+āśu · praviśya kṛṣṇā sadanaṃ mahībhujā tad ācacakṣe 'nujasannidhau vacaḥ tad+ācacakṣe · vicintayantyā bhavadāpadaṃ parāṃ rujanti cetaḥ prasabhaṃ mamādhayaḥ bhavat+āpadam→bhavadāpadaṃ · navīkariṣyatyupaśuṣyad ārdraḥ sa tvad vinā me hṛdayaṃ nikāraḥ upaśuṣyat→navīkariṣyatyupaśuṣyad +ārdraḥ

viśaṅkamāno bhavataḥ parābhavaṃ nṛpāsanastho 'pi vanādhivāsinaḥ viśaṅkamāno+bhavataḥ · dhunvan dhanuḥ kasya raṇe na kuryān mano bhayaikapravaṇaṃ sa bhīṣmaḥ mano+bhaya · adhivasati sadā yad enaṃ janair aviditavibhavo bhavānīpatiḥ vibhavaḥ→aviditavibhavo +bhavānī · āgamād iva tamo'pahād itaḥ sambhavanti matayo bhavacchidaḥ matayo+bhava

agatāv aridṛṣṭigocaraṃ śitanistriṃśayujau maheṣudhī agatāv+ari · asāv anāsthāparayāvadhīritaḥ saroruhiṇyā śirasā namann api asāv+anāsthā · śramam ādadhāv asukaraṃ na tapaḥ kim ivāvasādakaram ātmavatām ādadhāv+asukaraṃ · upamāṃ yayāv aruṇadīdhitibhiḥ parimṛṣṭamūrdhani tamālatarau yayāv+aruṇa

sa bibharti bhīṣaṇabhujaṃgabhujaḥ pṛthi vidviṣāṃ bhayavidhāyi dhanuḥ sa+bibharti · nirīkṣya rāmā bubudhe nabhaścarair alaṃkṛtaṃ tadvapuṣaiva maṇḍanam rāmā+bubudhe · kavacaṃ sa bibhrad upavītapadanihitasajyakārmukaḥ sa+bibhrad · tayadātavadā bhīmā mābhīdā bata dāyata mābhīdā+bata

dviṣāṃ vighātāya vidhātum icchato rahasy anujñām adhigamya bhūbhṛtaḥ icchato+rahasy · atha jayāya nu merumahībhṛto rabhasayā nu digantadidṛkṣayā mahībhṛtaḥ→merumahībhṛto +rabhasayā · marutaḥ śivā navatṛṇā jagatī vimalaṃ nabho rajasi vṛṣṭir apām nabho+rajasi · setutvaṃ dadhati payomucāṃ vitāne saṃrambhād abhipatato rathāñ javena abhipatato+rathāñ

āśānām uparacitām ivaikaveṇīṃ ramyormīṃ tridaśanadīṃ yayur balāni yayur+balāni · śilāghanair nākasadām uraḥsthalair bṛhanniveśaiś ca vadhūpayodharaiḥ sthalaiḥ→uraḥsthalair +bṛhat · baddhormi nākavanitāparibhuktamuktaṃ sindhor babhāra salilaṃ śayanīyalakṣmīm sindhor+babhāra · yoṣitām iti kathāsu sametaiḥ kāmibhir bahurasā dhṛtir ūhe kāmibhir+bahu

akṛtrimapremarasāhitair mano haranti rāmāḥ kṛtakair apīhitaiḥ mano+haranti · anyonyaraktamanasām atha bibhratīnāṃ cetobhuvo harisakhāpsarasāṃ nideśam bhuvaḥ→cetobhuvo +harisakha · vyathitam api bhṛśaṃ mano harantī pariṇatajambuphalopabhogahṛṣṭā mano+harantī · tapasvino hi vasate kevalājinavalkale tapasvino+hi

tad alaṃ pratipakṣam unnater avalambya vyavasāyavandhyatām unnater+avalambya · janavan na bhavantam akṣamā nayasiddher apanetum arhati siddhyāḥ→nayasiddher +apanetum · ā saṃsṛter asmi jagatsu jātas tvayyāgate yad bahumānapātram saṃsṛter+asmi · ādhidviṣām ā tapasāṃ prasiddher asmad vinā mā bhṛśam unmanībhūḥ prasiddher+asmad

tataḥ śaraccandrakarābhirāmair utsarpibhiḥ prāṃśum ivāṃśujālaiḥ tataḥ+śarad · kṛtormirekhaṃ śithilatvam āyatā śanaiḥ śanaiḥ śāntarayeṇa vāriṇā śanaiḥ+śanaiḥ · kṛtormirekhaṃ śithilatvam āyatā śanaiḥ śanaiḥ śāntarayeṇa vāriṇā śanaiḥ+śānta · śukāvalir vyaktaśirīṣakomalā dhanuḥśriyaṃ gotrabhido 'nugacchati dhanus+śriyam→dhanuḥśriyaṃ

vyadhatta yasmin puram uccagopuraṃ purāṃ vijetur dhṛtaye dhanādhipaḥ vijetur+dhṛtaye · rājadbhiḥ pathi marutām abhinnarūpair ulkārciḥ sphuṭagatibhir dhvajāṅkuśānām gatibhiḥ→sphuṭagatibhir +dhvaja · pṛthubhir dhvajinīsravair akārṣīccakitodbhrāntamṛgāṇi kānanāni pṛthubhir+dhvajinī · anubhāvavatā guru sthiratvād avisaṃvādi dhanur dhanaṃjayena dhanur+dhanaṃjayena

sa kiṃsakhā sādhu na śāsti yo 'dhipaṃ hitān na yaḥ saṃśṛṇute sa kiṃprabhuḥ sa+kiṃsakhā · sa kiṃsakhā sādhu na śāsti yo 'dhipaṃ hitān na yaḥ saṃśṛṇute sa kiṃprabhuḥ sa+kiṃprabhuḥ · sa kṣattriyas trāṇasahaḥ satāṃ yas tat kārmukaṃ karmasu yasya śaktiḥ sa+kṣattriyas · hṛdayāni samāviveśa sa kṣaṇam udbāṣpadṛśāṃ tapobhṛtām sa+kṣaṇam

mahībhujāṃ saccaritaiś caraiḥ kriyāḥ sa veda niḥśeṣam aśeṣitakriyaḥ sat+caritaiḥ→saccaritaiś · athāmarṣān nisargācca jitendriyatayā tayā nisargāt+ca→nisargācca · vimalaṃ kaluṣībhavac ca cetaḥ kathayaty eva hitaiṣiṇaṃ ripuṃ vā kaluṣībhavac+ca · pṛthubhir dhvajinīsravair akārṣīccakitodbhrāntamṛgāṇi kānanāni akārṣīt+cakita→akārṣīccakitodbhrāntamṛgāṇi

sa yauvarājye navayauvanoddhataṃ nidhāya duḥśāsanam iddhaśāsanaḥ sa+yauvarājye · ṛṣivaṃśajaḥ sa yadi daityakule yadi vānvaye mahati bhūmibhṛtām sa+yadi · ākṣiptadrumagahanā yugāntavātaiḥ paryastā giraya iva dvipā virejuḥ gahanāḥ→ākṣiptadrumagahanā +yugānta · ādudhāva parilīnavihaṅgā yāminīmarud apāṃ vanarājīḥ vihaṃgāḥ→parilīnavihaṅgā +yāminī

sa cintayaty eva bhiyas tvad eṣyatīr aho durantā balavadvirodhitā tvad+eṣyatīr · puropanītaṃ nṛpa rāmaṇīyakaṃ dvijātiśeṣeṇa yad etad andhasā yad+etad · paritaḥ paṭu bibhrad enasāṃ dahanaṃ dhāma vilokanakṣamam bibhrad+enasāṃ · jagatprasūtir jagadekapāvanī vrajopakaṇṭhaṃ tanayair upeyuṣī jagat+eka→jagadekapāvanī

bhavantam etarhi manasvigarhite vivartamānaṃ naradeva vartmani naradeva+vartmani · catasṛṣv api te vivekinī nṛpa vidyāsu nirūḍhim āgatā nṛpa+vidyāsu · priyeṣu yaiḥ pārtha vinopapatter vicintyamānaiḥ klamam eti cetaḥ pārtha+vinā · yadi manasi śamaḥ kim aṅga cāpaṃ śaṭha viṣayās tava vallabhā na muktiḥ śaṭha+viṣayās

puropanītaṃ nṛpa rāmaṇīyakaṃ dvijātiśeṣeṇa yad etad andhasā purā+upanītam→puropanītaṃ · sahasopagataḥ savismayaṃ tapasāṃ sūtir asūtir enasām sahasā+upagataḥ→sahasopagataḥ · bhūbhartuḥ samadhikam ādadhe tadorvyāḥ śrīmattāṃ harisakhavāhinīniveśaḥ tadā+urvyāḥ→tadorvyāḥ · na dalati nicaye tathotpalānāṃ na ca viṣamacchadagucchayūthikāsu tathā+utpalānām→tathotpalānāṃ

parair aparyāsitavīryasampadāṃ parābhavo 'py utsava eva māninām parābhavo+'py · sahate na jano 'py adhaḥkriyāṃ kimu lokādhikadhāma rājakam jano+'py · ekatām iva gatasya vivekaḥ kasyacin na mahato 'py upalebhe mahato+'py · śreyaso 'py asya te tāta vacaso nāsmi bhājanam śreyaso+'py

vihāya śāntiṃ nṛpa dhāma tat punaḥ prasīda saṃdhehi vadhāya vidviṣām punaḥ+prasīda · aṇur apy upahanti vigrahaḥ prabhum antaḥprakṛtiprakopajaḥ antar+prakṛti→antaḥprakṛtiprakopajaḥ · muhuḥ praṇunneṣu mathāṃ vivartanair nadatsu kumbheṣu mṛdaṅgamantharam muhuḥ+praṇunneṣu · gharmadyuter iha muhuḥ paṭalāni dhāmnām ādarśamaṇḍalanibhāni samullasanti muhuḥ+paṭalāni

vipado 'bhibhavanty avikramaṃ rahayaty āpadupetam āyatiḥ rahayaty+āpad · ā saṃsṛter asmi jagatsu jātas tvayyāgate yad bahumānapātram tvayi+āgate→tvayyāgate · iyāya sakhyāviva samprasādaṃ viśvāsayatyāśu satāṃ hi yogaḥ viśvāsayati+āśu→viśvāsayatyāśu · pratyārdrīkṛtatilakās tuṣārapātaiḥ prahlādaṃ śamitapariśramā diśantaḥ prati+ārdrīkṛta→pratyārdrīkṛtatilakās

sahate na jano 'py adhaḥkriyāṃ kimu lokādhikadhāma rājakam 'py+adhas · jyotsnāśaṅkām iva vitarati haṃsaśyenī madhye 'py ahnaḥ sphaṭikarajatabhitticchāyā 'py+ahnaḥ · praṇidhāya cittam atha bhaktatayā vidite 'py apūrva iva tatra hariḥ 'py+apūrva · kṣīṇayāvakaraso 'py atipānaiḥ kāntadantapadasambhṛtaśobhaḥ 'py+ati

sahasopagataḥ savismayaṃ tapasāṃ sūtir asūtir enasām asūtir+enasām · duḥśāsanāmarṣarajovikīrṇair ebhir vinārthair iva bhāgyanāthaiḥ vikīrṇaiḥ→duḥśāsanāmarṣarajovikīrṇair +ebhir · āpur eva mithunāni viyogaṃ laṅghyate na khalu kālaniyogaḥ āpur+eva · sphuṭam abhilaṣitaṃ babhūva vadhvā vadati hi saṃvṛtir eva kāmitāni saṃvṛtir+eva

triḥsaptakṛtvo jagatīpatīnāṃ hantā gurur yasya sa jāmadagnyaḥ gurur+yasya · puro 'bhisasre surasundarījanair yathottarecchā hi guṇeṣu kāminaḥ janaiḥ→surasundarījanair +yathottarā · kāntaveśma bahu saṃdiśatībhir yātam eva rataye ramaṇībhiḥ saṃdiśatībhir+yātam · yāvan neṣubhir ādatte viluptam aribhir yaśaḥ aribhir+yaśaḥ

parisphurallolaśikhāgrajihvaṃ jagajjighatsantam ivāntavahnim parisphurat+lola→parisphurallolaśikhāgrajihvaṃ · śrīmallatābhavanam oṣadhayaḥ pradīpāḥ śayyā navāni haricandanapallavāni śrīmat+latā→śrīmallatābhavanam · klānto 'pi tridaśavadhūjanaḥ purastāl līnāhiśvasitavilolapallavānām purastāl+līna · sajalajaladharaṃ nabho vireje vivṛtim iyāya rucis taḍillatānām taḍit+latānām→taḍillatānām

niryāya vidyātha dinādiramyād bimbād ivārkasya mukhān maharṣeḥ mahā+ṛṣeḥ→maharṣeḥ · iti bruvāṇena mahendrasūnuṃ maharṣiṇā tena tirobabhūve mahā+ṛṣiṇā→maharṣiṇā · dhairyeṇa viśvāsyatayā maharṣes tīvrād arātiprabhavācca manyoḥ mahā+ṛṣeḥ→maharṣes · tad āśu kurvan vacanaṃ maharṣer manorathān naḥ saphalīkuruṣva mahā+ṛṣeḥ→maharṣer

divyastrīṇāṃ sacaraṇalākṣārāgā rāgāyāte nipatitapuṣpāpīḍāḥ rāgāḥ→sacaraṇalākṣārāgā +rāgāyāte · adhikāṃ sa rodhasi babandha dhṛtiṃ mahate rujann api guṇāya mahān sa+rodhasi · sa rathāṅganāmavanitāṃ karuṇair anubadhnatīm abhinananda rutaiḥ sa+rathāṅga · nemīnām asati vivartanai rathaughair āsede viyati vimānavat pravṛttiḥ vivartanai+ratha

mahate phalāya tad avekṣya śivaṃ vikasannimittakusumaṃ sa puraḥ sa+puraḥ · sa pumān arthavaj janmā yasya nāmni puraḥsthite sa+pumān · nāma yasyābhinandanti dviṣo 'pi sa pumān pumān sa+pumān · sa prayujya tanaye mahīpater ātmajātisadṛśīṃ kilānatim sa+prayujya

tathāpi jihmaḥ sa bhavajjigīṣayā tanoti śubhraṃ guṇasampadā yaśaḥ bhavat+jigīṣayā→bhavajjigīṣayā · lalitāḥ sakhīr iva bṛhajjaghanāḥ suranimnagām upayatīḥ saritaḥ bṛhat+jaghanāḥ→bṛhajjaghanāḥ · mahate jayāya maghavann anaghaḥ puruṣas tapasyati tapajjagatīm tapat+jagatīm→tapajjagatīm · saṃrejire surasarijjaladhautahārās tārāvitānataralā iva yāmavatyaḥ surasarit+jala→surasarijjaladhautahārās

gurūpadiṣṭena ripau sute 'pi vā nihanti daṇḍena sa dharmaviplavam sa+dharma · mahaujaso mānadhanā dhanārcitā dhanurbhṛtaḥ saṃyati labdhakīrtayaḥ dhanāḥ→mānadhanā +dhana · mahaujaso mānadhanā dhanārcitā dhanurbhṛtaḥ saṃyati labdhakīrtayaḥ arcitāḥ→dhanārcitā +dhanurbhṛtaḥ · puraḥsarā dhāmavatāṃ yaśodhanāḥ suduḥsahaṃ prāpya nikāram īdṛśam puraḥsarā+dhāmavatāṃ

vihāya lakṣmīpatilakṣma kārmukaṃ jaṭādharaḥ sañ juhudhīha pāvakam sañ+juhudhi · kavacaṃ ca saratnam udvahañjvalitajyotir ivāntaraṃ divaḥ udvahan+jvalita→udvahañjvalitajyotir · setutvaṃ dadhati payomucāṃ vitāne saṃrambhād abhipatato rathāñ javena rathāñ+javena · bṛhadudvahañ jaladanādi dhanur upahitaikamārgaṇam udvahan→bṛhadudvahañ +jalada

dharmātmajo dharmanibandhinīnāṃ prasūtim enaḥpraṇudāṃ śrutīnām ātmajaḥ→dharmātmajo +dharma · patanti nāsmin viśadāḥ patatriṇo dhṛtendracāpā na payodapaṅktayaḥ patatriṇo+dhṛta · āsannadvipapadavīmadānilāya krudhyanto dhiyam avamatya dhūrgatānām krudhyanto+dhiyam · kṣatriyas tanayaḥ pāṇḍor ahaṃ pārtho dhanaṃjayaḥ pārtho+dhanaṃjayaḥ

śarannadīnāṃ pulinaiḥ kutūhalaṃ galaddukūlair jaghanair ivādadhe śarad+nadīnām→śarannadīnāṃ · vihitasāṃdhyamayūkham iva kvacin nicitakāñcanabhittiṣu sānuṣu kvacin+nicita · śiroruhāḥ svin natapakṣmasantater dvirephavṛndaṃ nu niśabdaniścalam svin+nata · priyeṇa siktā caramaṃ vipakṣataś cukopa kācin na tutoṣa sāntvanaiḥ kācin+na

soḍhavān no daśām antyāṃ jyāyān eva guṇapriyaḥ no+daśām · sulabho hi dviṣāṃ bhaṅgo durlabhā satsv avācyatā bhaṅgo+durlabhā · hradair ivārkaniṣpītaiḥ prāptaḥ paṅko durutsahaḥ paṅko+durutsahaḥ · yāta kiṃ vidiśo jetuṃ tuñjeśo divi kiṃtayā īśaḥ→tuñjeśo +divi

ato 'rhasi kṣantum asādhu sādhu vā hitaṃ manohāri ca durlabhaṃ vacaḥ ato+'rhasi · puro 'bhisasre surasundarījanair yathottarecchā hi guṇeṣu kāminaḥ puro+'bhisasre · iti priyaṃ kāṃcid upaitum icchatīṃ puro 'nuninye nipuṇaḥ sakhījanaḥ puro+'nuninye · munayas tato 'bhimukham etya nayanavinimeṣanoditāḥ tato+'bhimukham

vasūni vāñchan na vaśī na manyunā svadharma ity eva nivṛttakāraṇaḥ ity+eva · sa cintayaty eva bhiyas tvad eṣyatīr aho durantā balavadvirodhitā cintayaty+eva · sādhuvṛttān api kṣudrā vikṣipanty eva sampadaḥ vikṣipanty+eva · vimalaṃ kaluṣībhavac ca cetaḥ kathayaty eva hitaiṣiṇaṃ ripuṃ vā kathayaty+eva

gurūpadiṣṭena ripau sute 'pi vā nihanti daṇḍena sa dharmaviplavam guru+upadiṣṭena→gurūpadiṣṭena · svayaṃ pradugdhe 'sya guṇair upasnutā vasūpamānasya vasūni medinī vasu+upamānasya→vasūpamānasya · avahitahṛdayo vidhāya sa arhām ṛṣivad ṛṣipravare gurūpadiṣṭām guru+upadiṣṭām→gurūpadiṣṭām · bhartṛṣūpasakhi nikṣipatīnām ātmano madhumadodyamitānām bhartṛṣu+upasakhi→bhartṛṣūpasakhi

parair aparyāsitavīryasampadāṃ parābhavo 'py utsava eva māninām utsava+eva · keśaiḥ kadarthīkṛtavīryasāraḥ kaccit sa evāsi dhanaṃjayas tvam sa+eva · sa eṣa kailāsa upāntasarpiṇaḥ karoty akālāstamayaṃ vivasvataḥ sa+eṣa · sādhaneṣu hi rater upadhatte ramyatāṃ priyasamāgama eva samāgamaḥ→priyasamāgama +eva

kuru tanmatim eva vikrame nṛpa nirdhūya tamaḥ pramādajam nṛpa+nirdhūya · kim upekṣase kathaya nātha na tava viditaṃ na kiṃcana nātha+na · na namanti caikapuruṣaṃ puruṣās tava yāvad īśa na natiḥ kriyate īśa+na · iyam anagha nimittaśaktiḥ parā tava varada na cittabhedaḥ kvacit anagha+nimitta

vimalā tava vistare girāṃ matir ādarśa ivābhidṛśyate tava+vistare · labhyā dharitrī tava vikrameṇa jyāyāṃś ca vīryāstrabalair vipakṣaḥ tava+vikrameṇa · caratas tapas tava vaneṣu sadā na vayaṃ nirūpayitum asya gatim tava+vaneṣu · yadi manasi śamaḥ kim aṅga cāpaṃ śaṭha viṣayās tava vallabhā na muktiḥ tava+vallabhā

atimūḍha udasyate nayān nayahīnād aparajyate janaḥ mūḍhaḥ→atimūḍha +udasyate · sa eṣa kailāsa upāntasarpiṇaḥ karoty akālāstamayaṃ vivasvataḥ kailāsa+upānta · ity aneka upadeśa iva sma svādyate yuvatibhir madhuvāraḥ aneka+upadeśa · saṃtataṃ niśamayanta utsukā yaiḥ prayānti mudam asya sūrayaḥ niśamayanta+utsukā

kṛtormirekhaṃ śithilatvam āyatā śanaiḥ śanaiḥ śāntarayeṇa vāriṇā kṛta+ūrmi→kṛtormirekhaṃ · varorubhir vāraṇahastapīvaraiś cirāya khinnān navapallavaśriyaḥ vara+ūrubhiḥ→varorubhir · atiprasaṅgād vihitāgaso muhuḥ prakampam īyuḥ sabhayā ivormayaḥ iva+ūrmayaḥ→ivormayaḥ · utsarpitormicayalaṅghitatīradeśam autsukyanunnam iva vāri puraḥ pratasthe utsarpita+ūrmi→utsarpitormicayalaṅghitatīradeśam

madhyamopalanibhe lasadaṃśāv ekataś cyutim upeyuṣi bhānau ekataś+cyutim · vicakarṣa ca saṃhiteṣur uccaiś caraṇāskandananāmitācalendraḥ uccaiś+caraṇa · yugapad dadṛśe viśan varāhaṃ tadupoḍhaiś ca nabhaścaraiḥ pṛṣatkaḥ nabhas+caraiḥ→nabhaścaraiḥ · trāsajihmaṃ yataś caitān mandam evānviyāya saḥ yataś+ca

diṅmukheṣu na ca dhāma vikīrṇaṃ bhūṣitaiva rajanī himabhāsā bhūṣitā+eva→bhūṣitaiva · tadaikākī sabandhuḥ sann iṣṭena rahito yadā tadā+ekākī→tadaikākī · tarasaiva ko 'pi bhuvanaikapuruṣa puruṣas tapasyati tarasā+eva→tarasaiva · athavaiṣa kṛtajñayeva pūrvaṃ bhṛśam āsevitayā ruṣā na muktaḥ athavā+eṣa→athavaiṣa

sa sauṣṭhavaudāryaviśeṣaśālinīṃ viniścitārthām iti vācam ādadhe sauṣṭhava+audārya→sauṣṭhavaudāryaviśeṣaśālinīṃ · avagāḍham īkṣitum ivaibhapatiṃ vikasadvilocanaśataṃ saritaḥ iva+aibha→ivaibhapatiṃ · jvalitauṣadhijātavedasā himaśailena samaṃ vididyute jvalita+auṣadhi→jvalitauṣadhijātavedasā · vikārmukaḥ karmasu śocanīyaḥ paricyutaudārya ivopacāraḥ paricyuta+audāryaḥ→paricyutaudārya

asaktam ārādhayato yathāyathaṃ vibhajya bhaktyā samapakṣapātayā ārādhayato+yathāyathaṃ · savibhramādhūtakarāgrapallavo yathārthatām āpa vilāsinījanaḥ pallavaḥ→savibhramādhūtakarāgrapallavo +yathārtha · munim abhimukhatāṃ ninīṣavo yāḥ samupayayuḥ kamanīyatāguṇena ninīṣavo+yāḥ · tadaikākī sabandhuḥ sann iṣṭena rahito yadā rahito+yadā
